task_description: Production-readiness hardening for Horrorgeticon Ops: security headers, rate limiting, SSE connection management, graceful shutdown, and input validation audit. These are the critical-path items that could cause failures on event night.

verification.summary: All 164 tests pass (143 original + 21 new). Tests exercise real code paths: rate limiting, security headers, body size limits, SSE connection limits, input validation/truncation, and JSON depth protection. All would fail if the corresponding hardening code were reverted.
